epigraph.quote: She opened the door with "Hello! Would you like a drink + a pee?"

per_stop.quote: Only one chemical toilet, John got out & ran up the hill.
We wandered around antique shops, Simon looking for dining room chairs (unsuccessful) + Eve looking for hair pins (successful)
Thomas + William slept at the bottom of the garden.
We had a delicious roast lunch, + chatted.
We drove to Portsmouth + ate in the carpark, surrounded by hoardes of French students.
the site was very wet, boggy grass & a lake, but had a shop & was friendly.
William got everyone into Finsbury Circus Park for a picnic.
